response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platform and domain expertise in Fixed Income or Capital Markets. Their background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and embedded systems, with minimal or no mention of Windows C++ development, SQL Server/Oracle, or financial domain experience.
strengths: Strong software development background with experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to work in diverse technical environments and solve complex problems
Experience with CI/CD practices and modern development methodologies
concerns: No demonstrated C++ development experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No visible domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking
Lacks experience with SQL Server or Oracle (mandatory requirement)
